principles.title: Ground-Truth Capture
principles.description: Every data point originates from a verifiable source—sensors, certified inspections, or AI analysis with human oversight.
principles.example: When Terrain Vision analyzes a drone image, the original imagery is archived, the AI model version is logged, confidence scores are recorded, and human reviewers can flag disagreements—all before any report is generated.

principles.title: Tamper Resistance
principles.description: Audit trails are append-only and cryptographically linked, making retroactive changes detectable.
principles.example: Each ecosystem event receives a unique hash incorporating the previous event's hash, creating a chain where any modification would invalidate all subsequent entries.

principles.title: Radical Transparency
principles.description: Methodology, data sources, and calculation logic are documented and accessible for audit.
principles.example: TRN reward calculations reference specific contribution records, apply documented formulas, and produce audit logs that any holder can verify against treasury reports.

principles.title: Privacy by Design
principles.description: Sensitive data is protected while maintaining verifiability through selective disclosure and role-based access.
principles.example: A regulator can verify that an SCM inspection occurred and passed without accessing the property owner's personal information or detailed business records.

evidenceChain.title: Evidence Chain
evidenceChain.description: The Evidence Chain is our unified audit infrastructure that connects activities across all Terrain products into a single, verifiable record.

layers.name: Source Layer
layers.description: Raw data capture from field operations, sensors, and AI systems

layers.name: Verification Layer
layers.description: Human review, cross-validation, and quality scoring

layers.name: Aggregation Layer
layers.description: Event correlation and compliance report generation

auditPacket.title: Audit Packet
auditPacket.description: A downloadable, self-contained evidence package that a regulator or auditor can use to verify any claim made by the Terrain ecosystem.

contents.description: High-level overview of the claim and verification status
Original data, imagery, and sensor readings
AI model versions, confidence scores, human reviews
Complete audit trail from capture to report
Steps to independently verify the packet's integrity
